scenario.key_phrase: I'm interested but need to discuss with my parents

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! Am I speaking with Aarti? This is Priya from PhysicsWallah sales team. How are you doing today?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hi, yes this is Aarti. I'm good, thank you. Actually I was looking at your website yesterday.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: That's wonderful! I'm glad you're exploring PW. Can you tell me which class you're currently in?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm in Class 11 right now, just started this year.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect timing! And what exam are you preparing for? JEE, NEET, or boards?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: JEE Main. I want to get into a good engineering college, but honestly the competition is so tough.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul! JEE is competitive, but with proper guidance you can definitely crack it. You have good time - almost 18 months for preparation. Are you currently taking any coaching?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I go to a local coaching center here in Vijayawada, but I feel like I need more practice and better explanation of concepts.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I understand. Many students feel that gap. Our JEE Lakshya 2027 batch is perfect for students like you - it has comprehensive concept building plus tons of practice. Have you checked any specific courses on our platform?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I saw a few courses but there are so many options. What's the difference between Lakshya and the other JEE courses?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great question! Lakshya is our premium JEE course with live classes, doubt solving, test series, and personal mentorship. Arjuna is more affordable with recorded lectures and basic support. For serious JEE prep, I'd recommend Lakshya.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: That sounds good, but what about the fees? My family is a bit concerned about the cost.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I totally understand the concern. JEE Lakshya 2027 is ₹35,999, but here's the good part - we offer 0% EMI through PW Pay. That's just ₹3,499 per month. Less than what most families spend on daily chai and snacks!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: ₹3,499 per month... that's still quite a bit for us. Is there any cheaper alternative that's still good quality?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Absolutely! JEE Arjuna 2027 might be perfect for you - it's ₹19,999 total, which is ₹1,999 per month on EMI. You still get quality content from our top faculty, just with recorded classes instead of live ones.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: That sounds more reasonable. But will recorded classes be enough? I sometimes need to ask doubts immediately.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Valid concern! Even in Arjuna, you get doubt clearing sessions and can post questions on our platform. Plus you can rewatch difficult topics multiple times. Many of our toppers have used this course successfully.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hmm, that's reassuring. Can you tell me more about what exactly is included in the Arjuna course?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Sure! Arjuna includes complete JEE syllabus videos by Alakh Sir and top faculty, chapter-wise tests, previous year questions, study material PDFs, and doubt support. Basically everything you need for JEE prep.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: This sounds interesting, but I'll need to discuss with my parents first. They handle all the financial decisions at home.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Of course! That's completely understandable. Family discussion is important for such decisions. Would you like me to call back after you've spoken with them? When would be a good time?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, that would be great. Can you call tomorrow evening around 7 PM? My parents will be home by then and we can discuss together.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! I'll call you tomorrow at 7 PM. Meanwhile, you can show them our website and maybe watch a few free videos to get a feel for our teaching style. Does that sound good?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, that's a great idea. I'll definitely check out some free content and discuss the Arjuna course with them.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Wonderful! Just to confirm - I have your number ending with the digits I called on. Is this the best number to reach you tomorrow?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, this is the right number. You can call on this tomorrow evening.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great! I'll speak with you and your parents tomorrow at 7 PM. Meanwhile, feel free to WhatsApp me if you have any questions. Have a good day, Aarti!

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Thank you so much, Priya! You've been really helpful. I'll talk to my parents and see you tomorrow. Bye!

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: My pleasure! Looking forward to speaking with your family tomorrow. Take care and bye!
